title: Voneus Community Fun Run
subtitle: Community-first brand storytelling
summary: Superfast broadband provider supporting local rural communities through visible community engagement.
miniCaseStudy: Voneus sponsors a fun run for Shipston Home Nursing to raise funds and strengthen local presence. Flashbuzz captured their involvement, the people behind the brand, and the atmosphere of the day to humanise the business and raise brand profile through authentic community storytelling.

title: Smyths Toys Recruitment Social Campaign
subtitle: Personality-led hiring content for TikTok and Instagram
summary: Social-first recruitment content celebrating staff personalities and real stories.
miniCaseStudy: Vertical video campaign built for TikTok and Instagram to position Smyths as a modern employer that celebrates individuality. Focused on staff character and culture to help future colleagues connect with the people behind the brand.

title: Beardmail Oxford Street Activation
subtitle: Guerrilla launch content with humour and energy
summary: Fun brand activation in Oxford to generate leads and social content.
miniCaseStudy: Beardmail launched a playful street campaign using postbox costumes and public interviews to introduce their beard grooming packs. Flashbuzz captured real reactions and shaped the content into an upbeat social edit that generated attention and leads.

title: Bearded Viking Axe Masters Promo
subtitle: Experience-led film that drives bookings
summary: Venue promo built around theme, energy, and the host's personality.
miniCaseStudy: Charismatic owner Damo wanted a film that showcased facilities and the Viking-themed experience. Flashbuzz captured atmosphere, humour, and energy to drive corporate events interest and consumer bookings as an evergreen marketing asset.

title: Shipston Home Nursing Fundraising Film
subtitle: Purpose-led storytelling with recognised talent
summary: Charity awareness and fundraising film featuring actor Anton Lesser.
miniCaseStudy: Fundraising and awareness film for Shipston Home Nursing, designed to communicate mission and drive support. Featured Anton Lesser to add recognition and gravitas while keeping the focus on the charity's work and community impact.

title: Fine Fettle Dream Sequence Social Ad
subtitle: Quirky concept-led grooming advert
summary: Fun, cinematic social advert promoting organic beard oils and creams.
miniCaseStudy: Damien escapes the rat race into the woods, smashing his laptop and embracing his inner wild bearded self. Flashbuzz created a playful dream-sequence narrative to position Fine Fettle as identity and lifestyle, not just product.

title: Tugo Foods Pizza Concepts Showcase
subtitle: High-energy split-screen food marketing
summary: Marketing film demonstrating ease and support behind Tugo's pizza concepts.
miniCaseStudy: Split-screen, top-down sequence to show how easy two pizza products are to produce and how much support Tugo provides to partners adopting their concepts. Part of a long-term partnership producing high-volume food content.

title: Tugo Foods Pizza Box Oven Advert
subtitle: Visual hook that screams speed and efficiency
summary: Concept advert turning a pizza box into an instant oven to communicate speed.
miniCaseStudy: Chef builds the pizza, closes the lid, then heat and smoke reveal the pizza cooked instantly when reopened. A fast, memorable way to communicate how efficient Tugo pizzas are in food service environments.

title: White Stuff Warehouse Induction Film
subtitle: Culture plus first-day and H&S messaging
summary: Induction film for new warehouse starters combining USP and practical guidance.
miniCaseStudy: Collaboration with Quest Employment for White Stuff onboarding. Communicates why working there is different while delivering first-day and safety messaging to ensure confidence and consistency at scale.

title: Smyths Toys Flagship Recruitment Advert
subtitle: The main social hiring campaign for the year
summary: Social advert showing work, people, and culture at Smyths Toys.
miniCaseStudy: Built as Smyths' key recruitment advert for the year, designed to feel authentic and approachable while showcasing the team, culture, and environment candidates can expect.

title: Beauty Above Launch Event Film
subtitle: Founder-led launch content built for lead gen
summary: Launch film capturing event atmosphere and brand ethos for social lead generation.
miniCaseStudy: Startup salon launch in Oxfordshire. Flashbuzz captured the event and gave the owners a confident platform to communicate values and ethos, then used it as awareness and lead generation content across social.

title: Flutter Shutter Pitch Film
subtitle: Sustainability innovation for social housing
summary: Pitch-focused film supporting future government and industry contracts.
miniCaseStudy: All-female startup creating shutters to reduce heat loss in social housing. With existing contracts secured, the film supported future large procurement pitches by clearly explaining the problem, solution, credibility, and impact.

title: Bibby Recruitment Campaign Film
subtitle: Real, raw, and human national hiring campaign
summary: National recruitment film across Oxfordshire and Manchester.
miniCaseStudy: Designed to be inviting and honest, blending professional footage with mobile clips and outtakes. Built around laughter, personality, and genuine reasons employees love working at Bibby.

title: John Lewis Interactive Induction Film
subtitle: Video designed to integrate into live training
summary: Induction film structured to pause for live exercises and resume seamlessly.
miniCaseStudy: John Lewis wanted a fundamentally different induction experience. The video is shot and paced to feel like the viewer is in a real induction, with trainers pausing the film for live activities then resuming, creating a seamless blended training environment.

title: Tugo Foods Behind the Scenes
subtitle: From chef prep to polished cinematic shot
summary: Before-and-after BTS showing how cinematic food shots are created.
miniCaseStudy: Shows chefs finishing dishes at the development table, then reveals the final polished shot filmed using an electronic slider rig mounted upside down, gliding across food on a white table. Highlights craft and collaboration.

title: HERO ERA x Prodrive Mustang Build
subtitle: Documentary partnership film in motorsport engineering
summary: Restoring a Mustang into an endurance rally car from discovery to handover.
miniCaseStudy: Tracks an abandoned American Mustang being found, rebuilt, and fine-tuned at Prodrive's facility, then collected by its billionaire owner. Narrative-led documentary showcasing heritage, engineering, and ambition.

title: Peking to Paris Build-Up Film
subtitle: Broadcast-grade edit from mixed footage sources
summary: Anticipation film for the historic Peking to Paris endurance rally.
miniCaseStudy: Combined in-house videographer footage with additional Flashbuzz filming, edited into a cohesive build-up story. An alternative edit was submitted as a BBC programme concept and the programme was later picked up by Italian television.

title: Catherine House Hospice Awareness Film
subtitle: Sensitive, emotionally intelligent charity storytelling
summary: Awareness film highlighting hospice services and ongoing need for community support.
miniCaseStudy: Film created to raise awareness of Catherine House Hospice and the need for continual community support to sustain end-of-life care services. Required high sensitivity and respectful storytelling throughout production.

title: Tipping Kettle Product Demo
subtitle: Clear, safety-first e-commerce video for mobility support
summary: Simple product video showing safer pouring for customers with mobility issues.
miniCaseStudy: One-shot demonstration designed for clarity and confidence at purchase. Shows how a tipping kettle makes pouring easier and safer for users with reduced mobility.

title: Non-Tip Cup Product Demo
subtitle: Spill-resistant daily living support
summary: Demonstration of a cup designed to be difficult to knock over once placed on a surface.
miniCaseStudy: Clean, functional demo showing stability and spill prevention for customers with mobility issues. Built to reassure and communicate benefit instantly.
